# comfyui_model_sampling_continuous_v (Resource)

ComfyUI ModelSamplingContinuousV node — ModelSamplingContinuousV [advanced/model]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Input: MODEL (link)
- `sampling` (String) Input: COMBO
- `sigma_max` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 500
- `sigma_min` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0.03

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `model_output` (String) Output: MODEL (slot 0)
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
